summary.intent: Fix PR review comments and resolve all outstanding review conversations on a Rust gateway service.
summary.outcome: Fixed a P1 bug where a failed `list_session_keys_before` would cause `prune_runs_before` to orphan sessions, resolved all review threads, and pushed the fix.

repo: The gateway crate has a pruning loop that processes sessions before runs — order matters to avoid orphaned run records.
A pre-existing bug existed in the router where `cleanup_session` did not call `remove_image_override`; this was surfaced by the PR rather than introduced by it.

code.finding: In the pruning loop, when `list_session_keys_before` fails, the correct behavior is to `continue` the iteration rather than fall through with an empty vec, which would cause `prune_runs_before` to delete run records whose sessions were never cleaned up.

workflow: Greptile is used for automated PR review and flags issues as P1/P2; its comments are replied to directly on the PR.
Fix commits are pushed and review threads are resolved after each round of comments.
Work is done inside a worktree at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/mahogany-night.

friction: Multiple rounds of PR review comments required iterative fixes rather than catching all issues upfront.
open_items: The pre-existing `cleanup_session` / `remove_image_override` bug in the router was noted as surfaced by this PR — it may warrant a separate fix if not already addressed.
